name: Joanne Woodward Lobster Tails in Patty Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lobster tails according to package directions and remove meat from shells.
2. Make the white sauce by melting butter and mixing in flour, working to a smooth paste.
3. Add milk (a small amount at first) and mix until creamy.
4. Gradually add remaining milk and cream, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in salt, chopped olives, pepper, red pimento, sliced mushrooms, Sauterne, and parsley.
6. Place lobster meat into the patty shells and serve.
